utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – sufficient. 2) travel_dates: provided (July 1-5, 2024) – specific dates – sufficient. 3) transportation: includes type, brief details (origin Paris, class, 4 people) and a single cost (€400). It lacks specific flight details (airline names, flight numbers, times), but the format only requires 'flight details with costs'; minimal details are present, arguably acceptable as 'details' with cost. 4) accommodation: hotel name, details (rating, nights, people) and cost – sufficient per format. 5) activities: selected activities listed and a total cost – sufficient per format (though not itemized, still acceptable). 6) additional_services: restaurants budget with cost – fits 'any extra services with costs'. 7) total_budget: provided as a single figure; the format asks for 'complete cost breakdown'. The package gives only the total without a breakdown line-by-line, but the individual sections include their costs, effectively forming a breakdown; still, the 'total_budget' field itself is just a single number, which is acceptable as the total, while the breakdown exists above. Therefore, all 7 items are present and sufficiently specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: Destination is 'Prague, Czech Republic' which matches the destinations list. Transportation is 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class' which maps to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class. Accommodation is 'Eco Lodge' which directly matches an accommodation entry. Activities include 'City Walking Tour', 'Museum Day Pass', and 'Zoo' which all exist in the activities list. No additional services from the rated 'additional_hotel_services' list were explicitly chosen, and restaurants are only budgeted, not specific types. Therefore, only those listed items are mapped to their ground-truth ratings.
